news: Pichle 24 ghante me kya hua hai, aayiye jaldi se dekhte hain badi khabrein!
Nepal mein protest LIVE: 18 log maut ke gath utar gaye jab social media ban par virodh bhadak gaya. India-Nepal border high alert par!
BREAKING: Supreme Court ne Aadhaar Card ko Bihar mein SIR ke liye '12th Document' ke roop mein swikrit karne ka nirdesh diya!
Jammu-Kashmir ke neta MLA Doda Mehraj Malik ke khilaf PSA ki ninda kar rahe hain. Political unrest badh raha hai!
Trump ne Russian oil kharidne wale deshon par 'second phase' of sanctions ready hone ki baat kahi. Geopolitical tensions badh rahi hain!
Fed ke rate cut optimism ne stocks ko upar uthaya, jab investors politics ko continents tak dekhne mein busy hain!
India aur Israel agli hafte bilateral investment treaty par hastakshar karne ki taiyari mein hain. Economic ties mazboot ho rahe hain!
Elon Musk ne X par Peter Navarro ke 'Russian oil' comment ke fact-checking par apna silence tod diya lagta hai!
Congress ko vote theft documentary SMSes bhejne par Trai ne manzoori nahi di. Communication hurdles samne aaye hain!
India samajhdari se kadam rakh raha hai jab Trump ne apni rhetoric ko soften kar diya. Geopolitical strategy ka samay aaya hai!
VP poll ke douran Reddy ne democratic space ke ghatne aur republic ko defend karne ki maang ki. Political debates ghenge hote ja rahe hain!
Toh, aaj ke liye itna hi. Hamari team aapko har nai khabar se update rakhti rahegi. Tab tak ke liye, apna khayal rakhen aur surakshit rahen. Namaskar.
